title: Oaks Visual NameTags
description: Adds Custom Textures for the Easter Egg nametags
body:
Oaks Visual NameTags is a simple and small resourcepack which changes the visuals of nametags when they are renamed to an Easter Egg for Name Tags

Which includes.
- "Toast" = ![Black and white nametag similar to the toast texture of a rabbit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb4f9c22791129fa7726424c38697b7a578f3a03.png)
- "Dinnerbone" or "Grumm" = ![Flipped Name Tag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12c95c149d4bdae0eafc4bc6895cd739d0c9684d.png)
- jeb_ = ![Rainbow nametag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc69184420819a19feb488e242d344ff26607a3a.gif)
